author: muhtasham
name: Classical 4-gram Artifact
blurb: Non-record classical submission: discounted hashed 4-gram model built from 10M train tokens, exported as a 14.31MB compressed artifact, and evaluated exactly on the full FineWeb validation split. Full-val BPB is 1.91070694 with full-val wallclock 571.97s and total submission size 14,368,969 bytes.
